compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing behavioral tests for wrapper detection logic
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create tests/scripts/test-wrapper-detection.sh with behavioral tests for the wrapper shell preprocessing detection logic. These tests verify the detection snippet that will be embedded in .claude/commands/ wrapper files.

### Tests to add:

1. test_detection_finds_installed_plugin — Create a mock claude binary in a temp dir that outputs "digital-service-orchestra" when called with plugin list. Prepend temp dir to PATH. Run the detection snippet (extracted from a template string since wrappers don't exist yet). Assert output is "PLUGIN_DETECTED". Test approach: mock binary on PATH, run detection in subshell, assert stdout.

2. test_detection_falls_back_when_no_plugin — Mock claude plugin list returns empty output. Assert output is "LOCAL_FALLBACK". Test approach: mock binary returns empty, run detection, assert fallback.

3. test_detection_falls_back_on_command_failure — Mock claude exits non-zero. Assert output is "LOCAL_FALLBACK". Test approach: mock binary exits 1, run detection, assert fallback.

4. test_detection_falls_back_when_no_binary — Remove claude from PATH entirely (use env -i with minimal PATH). Assert output is "LOCAL_FALLBACK". Test approach: run detection in clean env without claude binary, assert fallback.

### Detection snippet under test (template — embedded in test file):
```bash
DETECTION='bash -c '\''timeout 3 claude plugin list 2>/dev/null | grep -q "digital-service-orchestra" && echo "PLUGIN_DETECTED" || echo "LOCAL_FALLBACK"'\'''
```

Each test must save/restore PATH and use unique temp dirs. Tests run the DETECTION snippet in controlled subshells.

Add .test-index RED markers. Add .test-index entry mapping .claude/commands/ pattern to this test file.

### File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-wrapper-detection.sh (create)
- .test-index (modify: add RED markers and entries)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — RED tests tolerated via .test-index markers
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Four test functions exist in test-wrapper-detection.sh
  Verify: grep -cE '^test_detection_' tests/scripts/test-wrapper-detection.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED markers exist for detection tests
  Verify: grep -q 'test-wrapper-detection.sh \[test_detection_finds_installed_plugin\]' .test-index
- [ ] Tests create mock claude binaries (behavioral, not structural)
  Verify: grep -q 'mock_claude\|mock_dir\|mock_bin' tests/scripts/test-wrapper-detection.sh
- [ ] Tests save/restore PATH
  Verify: grep -q 'ORIG_PATH\|OLD_PATH\|SAVED_PATH' tests/scripts/test-wrapper-detection.sh

comments.body: Fixed: 4 behavioral detection tests written (all pass — testing known snippet)
comments.author: Test
